query:
CREATE TABLE `exams` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`discipline` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`questionCount` int NOT NULL,
	`topics` text NOT NULL,
	`questions` json NOT NULL,
	`examPdfKey` varchar(512),
	`answerPdfKey` varchar(512),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `exams_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user A6SUsyLtCq2qVaD.root --database e3fdVPryvkk7rKQX9vB5Uv --execute CREATE TABLE `exams` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`discipline` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`questionCount` int NOT NULL,
	`topics` text NOT NULL,
	`questions` json NOT NULL,
	`examPdfKey` varchar(512),
	`answerPdfKey` varchar(512),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `exams_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
